ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code for the size used in internal systems */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "international_standard" TEXT /* Indicates if the size is part of an international standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the international standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement point */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement point (e.g., Shoulder, Chest Width) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement point */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Default unit type for the measurement point (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement point */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES measurement_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender associated with the size category (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_category_sizes" (
  "category_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category relationship */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is the default size for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_category_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_category_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the garment type supports customization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_type_sizes" (
  "type_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type size relationship */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment type */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is preferred for the garment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_type_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_type_sizes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_type_measurements" (
  "type_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type measurement */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment type */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement point */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_type_measurements_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES measurement_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_type_measurements_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the garment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the garment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the garment */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the garment */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the garment is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_measurements" (
  "garment_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment measurement */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement point */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES measurement_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment variant */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variant */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the variant */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variant is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_variants_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_variant_measurements" (
  "variant_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment variant measurement */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment variant */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement point */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_variant_measurements_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES garment_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_variant_measurements_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES measurement_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control inspection */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the inspector */,
  "inspection_batch" TEXT /* Batch of inspections */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to (e.g., Quality Control, Production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production, quality control, sales) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., size chart, garment details) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_sizes" (
  "int_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each international size */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the international size */,
  "int_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the international size (e.g., US S, UK 8) */,
  "standard_code" TEXT /* Code for the international standard (e.g., US_S, UK_8) */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the international standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("int_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
